org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli

Class ConfigVariable

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli.ConfigVariable

  • public final class ConfigVariable
extends java.lang.Object
    A configuration variable for a ERSAP shell session.

      static class  ConfigVariable.Builder
      Helps creating a new ConfigVariable.

    • Method Detail

      • newBuilder

        public static ConfigVariable.Builder newBuilder(java.lang.String name,
                                                java.lang.String description)
        Creates a new builder of a configuration variable.
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the variable
        description - the description of the value stored in the variable
        Returns:
        the builder

      • getName

        public java.lang.String getName()
        Gets the name of this variable.
        Returns:
        the name of the variable

      • getDescription

        public java.lang.String getDescription()
        Gets the description of this variable.
        Returns:
        the description string

      • hasValue

        public boolean hasValue()
        Checks if this variable has a value.
        Returns:
        true if this variable has a value, false otherwise

      • getValue

        public java.lang.Object getValue()
        Gets the current value of this variable.
        Returns:
        the value of the variable
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the variable is not set

      • setValue

        public void setValue(java.lang.Object value)
        Sets this variable with a new value.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value for the variable
